features: Elegant Purple Set ‚Äì This 5-pack of beauty sponges in a sleek purple shade adds a touch of sophistication to your makeup routine, while providing a flawless and seamless finish.

Dual Usage: Wet & Dry ‚Äì Our versatile sponges are perfect for both wet and dry applications. Use them wet for blending liquid or cream products, and dry for applying powders, offering you flawless, even coverage.

Non-Latex & Skin-Friendly ‚Äì Made with premium, non-latex materials, these sponges are soft and gentle on all skin types, including sensitive skin. They reduce product absorption, saving more of your favorite cosmetics.

Ergonomic Design ‚Äì Featuring a pointed tip for precision and a rounded base for smooth, full coverage, these sponges are perfect for every makeup task, from blending concealer around the eyes to applying foundation on the cheeks.

Easy to Clean & Reusable ‚Äì Durable and easy to clean, these sponges can be used again and again. Simply wash with soap and water, let them air dry, and they‚Äôll be ready for your next beauty session.
description: Product Description Add a touch of elegance to your beauty routine with the G4GADGET 5 PCS Purple Makeup Sponges Set. Designed in a luxurious purple hue, these soft, non-latex sponges provide you with smooth and flawless makeup application every time. Whether you prefer liquid foundation, cream blush, or powder products, these offer seamless blending and even coverage. Crafted from high-quality, non-latex material, these sponges are perfect for all skin types, especially sensitive skin. They minimize makeup absorption, allowing you to save more of your favorite products. Ideal for both wet and dry use, our makeup sponges expand when damp, making them great for liquid or cream products. When used dry, they provide precise powder application, leaving you with a professional, flawless finish. The ergonomic design features pointed tips for detailed work around the eyes, nose, and lips, and a rounded base for quick, effortless coverage on larger areas of the face. Cleaning is a breeze‚Äîjust rinse with soap and water, let them dry, and enjoy their reusable convenience. Get that perfect, airbrushed look every day with G4GADGET‚Äôs 5 PCS Purple Makeup Sponge Set! Directions 1. For liquid or cream products, dampen the sponge and use it to blend and apply makeup. 2. For powder products, use the sponge dry for precise application. 3. To clean, rinse with soap and water, let it air dry. Repeat for future use.
